title: Instant Search Filter

statement.markdown:
## Instant List Search Filter

Build a real-time search filter interface that filters list items based on text input.

### Requirements:
1. **Real-time Filtering**: Type in the search input to instantly filter the list items below.
2. **Case Insensitivity**: Matching must be case-insensitive (e.g., typing `"apple"` should match `"Apple"`).
3. **Display updates**: Hide items that do not contain the search string using the `hidden` class, and display items that match.
4. **Handle Empty Queries**: When the input is empty, ensure all list items are visible again.

constraints: Must use 'input' event to capture search queries in real-time
Must filter elements dynamically without reloading or re-rendering the list container from scratch

starterCode.html:
• Apple MacBook Pro
  • Google Pixel Phone
  • Samsung Galaxy Ultra
  • Sony Noise Cancelling Headphones
  • Dell XPS Developer Edition

gradingCriteria.description: Verify list items are filtered dynamically, case-insensitively, and show/hide state maps inputs accurately.
Verify clean element loops, correct usage of textContent, and performant substring matching.
